sources.title: Classification of Surfaces repository, Lean Eval target, issues, and pull requests

Mathlib topological foundations.description: Existing manifold, compactness, quotient-topology, finite-combinatorics, and planar-geometry APIs used by every project route.
Mathlib topological foundations.mathlib_notes: This cluster is split into four concrete tier-2 roots.

C0 chart-boundary invariance.description: The no-retraction, Brouwer, and invariance-of-domain chain that removes the extra chart-boundary hypothesis from the benchmark theorem.
C0 chart-boundary invariance.mathlib_notes: Implemented project-locally by PR #11; the pinned Mathlib dependency does not provide the full chain used here.

Finite cell-complex incidence.description: Honest boundary-occurrence, edge-orbit validity, and dual-face connectedness predicates on raw finite surface presentations.
Finite cell-complex incidence.mathlib_notes: Project-specific Gallier-Xu incidence API, implemented by PR #13.

Polygonal quotient realization.description: Occurrence-indexed polygon sides, generated gluings, quotient topology, and the eventual realization of every surface cell complex.
Polygonal quotient realization.mathlib_notes: PR #14 proves the additive quotient foundation, but the public SurfaceCellComplex.Realization remains the arbitrary stored type.

Exact benchmark representatives.description: The exact closed-disc orientable and nonorientable quotient relations appearing in the Lean Eval source of truth.
Exact benchmark representatives.mathlib_notes: The local PUnit relations are placeholders and are not faithful to the benchmark statement.

Radó finite triangulation.description: Moise-style finite chart induction producing a geometric triangulation together with the incidence facts required downstream.
Radó finite triangulation.mathlib_notes: All but the genuine overlap branch of moise_induction_step is proved; PR #16 adds the local and union dual-connectivity tools.

Certified cell-complex handoff.description: Transport geometric incidence to a valid connected polygonal cell complex whose quotient realization is homeomorphic to the original surface.
Certified cell-complex handoff.mathlib_notes: PR #15 proves the conditional certificate transport and combinatorial conversion; the global certificate and quotient-realization homeomorphism remain.

Gallier-Xu normal-form reduction.description: Cyclic boundary-word moves, realization soundness, and reduction of a valid connected surface presentation to sphere, orientable, or nonorientable normal form.
Gallier-Xu normal-form reduction.mathlib_notes: The current normal-form theorem is a sorry and false as stated; issues #7 and #8 are prerequisites to its corrected proof.

Lean Eval assembly.description: The exact comparator-facing classification theorem assembled from the certified topology bridge and the faithful normal-form theorem.
Lean Eval assembly.mathlib_notes: The assembly proof is already short; it becomes genuine only after both independent branches are faithful and sorry-free.

Mathlib manifold and compactness interfa.description: ChartedSpace, IsManifold, T2Space, ConnectedSpace, CompactSpace, and EuclideanHalfSpace supply the benchmark hypotheses.
Mathlib manifold and compactness interfa.mathlib_notes: These are the exact ambient structures in the Lean Eval theorem.

Mathlib quotient topology and homeomorph.description: Quotient topologies, quotient maps, equivalence closures, and Homeomorph composition support all gluing arguments.
Mathlib quotient topology and homeomorph.mathlib_notes: The project also uses Homeomorph.Quotient congruence lemmas.

Mathlib finite combinatorics and relatio.id: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure
Mathlib finite combinatorics and relatio.description: Finset counting, finite sums, list boundary words, and reflexive-transitive/equivalence closures ground the incidence graph.
Mathlib finite combinatorics and relatio.mathlib_notes: Several standard finite APIs are combined project-locally.

Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle.id: Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle geometry
Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle.description: Closed balls, circles, convexity, Fourier characters, and Euclidean plane geometry underlie the disc and chart constructions.
Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle.mathlib_notes: The benchmark defines its closed unit disc and boundary parametrization from these declarations.

Planar no-retraction theorem.description: [proved on master] There is no continuous retraction from the planar closed unit ball to its frontier.
depends_on: Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle geometry

Planar Brouwer fixed-point theorem.description: [proved in PR #11] A continuous self-map of the planar closed unit ball has a fixed point.
depends_on: Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle geometry
Planar Brouwer fixed-point theorem.mathlib_notes: PR #11 derives the needed dimension-two result from the project no-retraction theorem.

Finite-dimensional invariance of domain.description: [proved in PR #11] A continuous injective map between finite-dimensional real vector spaces of equal dimension is open.
Finite-dimensional invariance of domain.mathlib_notes: Adapted from the completed core of mathlib4 PR #36770, with the missing Brouwer input supplied locally.

Unconditional chart-boundary invariance.description: [proved in PR #11] Preferred half-space charts agree on whether a point lies on the manifold boundary.
Unconditional chart-boundary invariance.mathlib_notes: PR #11 installs the ChartBoundaryInvariant instance and removes the extra public hypothesis.

Incidence-derived surface validity and c.description: [proved in PR #13] IsSurfaceValid counts unoriented edge occurrences and IsConnected is reachability in the face-adjacency graph.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure

Marked polygon cells and side coverage.id: Marked polygon cells and side coverage
Marked polygon cells and side coverage.description: [proved in PR #14] An arity-indexed closed disc has continuously parametrized boundary sides that cover its circle for positive arity.
depends_on: Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle geometry

Generated side-gluing setoid and quotien.id: Generated side-gluing setoid and quotient topology
Generated side-gluing setoid and quotien.description: [proved in PR #14] Side identifications generate an equivalence relation, quotient topology, quotient map, and congruence API.
depends_on: Marked polygon cells and side coverage

Occurrence-indexed pairing adapter.description: [proved in PR #14] Boundary occurrences, rather than dart labels, are paired so repeated labels such as the projective-plane word are handled correctly.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure

Additive polygonal realization of a cell.id: Additive polygonal realization of a cell complex
Additive polygonal realization of a cell.description: [proved in PR #14] PolygonalRealization constructs a genuine quotient from a valid occurrence pairing without changing the legacy public realization.
depends_on: Generated side-gluing setoid and quotient topology
Additive polygonal realization of a cell.mathlib_notes: This is additive groundwork; it is not yet consumed by EvalStatement.lean.

SurfaceCellComplex realization cutover.description: [missing; issue #7] Delete the arbitrary stored realization and define Realization to be the occurrence-indexed polygonal quotient.
depends_on: Additive polygonal realization of a cell complex
SurfaceCellComplex realization cutover.mathlib_notes: This cutover intentionally breaks the reflexive legacy bridge and forces the real homeomorphism proof.

Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorient.id: Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorientable relations
Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorient.description: [missing; issue #6] Replace PUnit and bottom setoids by the benchmark's inductive relations on the complex closed unit disc.
depends_on: Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle geometry
Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorient.mathlib_notes: The exact denominators are 4p+3n and 2p+3n, matching the trusted Lean Eval file.

Canonical normal-form boundary words.description: [missing] Define orientable handle words, nonorientable crosscap words, and three-edge boundary-component tails as one-face presentations.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure
Canonical normal-form boundary words.mathlib_notes: These words mediate between Gallier-Xu combinatorics and the exact benchmark relations.

source_refs.location: Gallier-Xu Definition 6.5 and Lean Eval docstrings

Polygon cell homeomorphic to the benchma.id: Polygon cell homeomorphic to the benchmark closed disc
Polygon cell homeomorphic to the benchma.description: [missing] Relate the generic marked PolygonCell carrier to Complex.ClosedUnitDisc with compatible boundary parameters.
depends_on: Marked polygon cells and side coverage
Mathlib planar convex and complex-circle geometry
Polygon cell homeomorphic to the benchma.mathlib_notes: This removes the remaining parallel-universe mismatch between PR #14 and the benchmark source.

source_refs.location: PR #14 and Lean Eval representative carrier

Canonical quotient correspondence with b.id: Canonical quotient correspondence with benchmark relations
Canonical quotient correspondence with b.description: [missing] Prove the polygonal quotient of each canonical boundary word homeomorphic to the exact Lean Eval Quot relation.
depends_on: Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorientable relations
Polygon cell homeomorphic to the benchmark closed disc
Generated side-gluing setoid and quotient topology
Canonical quotient correspondence with b.mathlib_notes: This is the representative-faithfulness theorem needed by the normal-form branch.

Geometric triangulation model.description: [proved on master] Embedded standard triangles cover the surface and intersect only in common faces.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure
Geometric triangulation model.mathlib_notes: Project declaration: GeometricTriangulation; PlaneComplex.toGeometricTriangulation is proved on master.

Finite Radó chart cover.description: [proved on master, unconditional after PR #11] Compactness supplies finitely many boundary-faithful chart pairs whose cores cover the surface.

Chart-patch surface-incidence certificat.description: [proved in PR #16] Every disk, half-disk, and full-plane chart patch has nonempty faces, edge valence at most two, and dual-face connectivity.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure

Dual-connectivity union across a seam.description: [proved in PR #16] Two dually connected face families remain connected after inclusion when one cross-family shared-edge adjacency exists.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure

Empty-stage dual connectivity.description: [proved in PR #16] The initial empty partial triangulation satisfies the dual-connectivity invariant vacuously.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure

Radó face-family gluing constructor.description: [missing; critical] Construct a single final partial triangulation containing relabelled old and patch faces, prove face exhaustion, a seam adjacency, valence preservation, embedding, and support properties.
Radó face-family gluing constructor.mathlib_notes: This data-rich constructor is the absent combinatorial content of the hard Radó overlap branch.

Radó invariant with dual connectivity.description: [missing] Strengthen RadoInvariant with dual-face connectivity only when the hard overlap branch can preserve it honestly.
Radó invariant with dual connectivity.mathlib_notes: Adding this field before the branch proof would merely strengthen the existing sorry and is explicitly forbidden by the audit guardrail.

Generic Radó induction step.description: [sorry; issue #4] Glue an existing partial triangulation to a chart patch when neither support absorbs the other.
Generic Radó induction step.mathlib_notes: Project declaration: moise_induction_step; its two degenerate branches are already proved.

Global geometric surface-incidence certi.description: [missing] Extract face nonemptiness, edge valence at most two, and dual connectivity from the final full-support Radó invariant.
Global geometric surface-incidence certi.mathlib_notes: PR #16 already proves final face nonemptiness from support = univ and transports SurfaceIncidence to GeometricTriangulation.

Moise finite geometric triangulation the.description: [currently inherits sorryAx] Every compact Eval surface admits a finite geometric triangulation carrying the global surface-incidence certificate.
Moise finite geometric triangulation the.mathlib_notes: The present moise_triangulation theorem returns only the triangulation; the corrected boundary should retain the certificate.

Legacy triangulation incidence certifica.description: [proved in PR #15] Package nonempty triangles, edge occurrence bounds, and dual-triangle reachability on FiniteSurfaceTriangulation.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure

Conditional geometric-to-legacy certific.description: [proved in PR #15] A geometric SurfaceIncidence witness induces the legacy triangulation incidence certificate.

Valid connected toCellComplex conversion.description: [proved in PR #15] An incidence-certified triangulation converts to a SurfaceCellComplex satisfying IsSurfaceValid and IsConnected.
Valid connected toCellComplex conversion.mathlib_notes: The combinatorial conclusions survive the realization cutover; the current reflexive realization homeomorphism does not.

Triangulation occurrence-pairing validit.description: [missing; near-term] Combine incidence validity with length-three triangle boundaries to obtain OccurrencePairingValid for every converted geometric triangulation.
Triangulation occurrence-pairing validit.mathlib_notes: This should be a small PR-sized bridge after PRs #14-#16 are integrated.

Triangulation realization to polygon quo.id: Triangulation realization to polygon quotient homeomorphism
Triangulation realization to polygon quo.description: [missing; hard] Prove the geometric triangulation surface homeomorphic to the quotient obtained by gluing its abstract triangle polygons along matching sides.
Triangulation realization to polygon quo.mathlib_notes: This replaces the current Homeomorph.refl placeholder after issue #7 is cut over.

Certified compact-surface cell-complex b.description: [missing] Return a cell complex K with S homeomorphic to K.Realization together with K.IsSurfaceValid and K.IsConnected.
depends_on: Triangulation realization to polygon quotient homeomorphism
Certified compact-surface cell-complex b.mathlib_notes: This is the strengthened replacement for compact_surface_homeomorphic_to_cell_complex.

Cyclic boundary-word and successor-verte.description: [missing] Define rotation/reversal, fresh-edge relabelling, successor permutations, and vertices derived from boundary words rather than legacy stored endpoints.
depends_on: Mathlib finite combinatorics and relation closure
Cyclic boundary-word and successor-verte.mathlib_notes: This is the clean combinatorial substrate for Gallier-Xu Chapter 6.

source_refs.location: Gallier-Xu Chapter 6 and design decision O1

Gallier-Xu elementary moves P1 and P2.id: Gallier-Xu elementary moves P1 and P2
Gallier-Xu elementary moves P1 and P2.description: [missing; issue #8] Define the elementary edge-subdivision and face-cut/paste moves and their equivalence closure on honest finite presentations.
Gallier-Xu elementary moves P1 and P2.mathlib_notes: The current Equivalent definition is circular homeomorphism of arbitrary stored realizations and must be replaced.

Elementary moves preserve polygonal real.description: [missing; issue #8] Each elementary move induces a homeomorphism between the corresponding polygonal quotient realizations.
depends_on: Gallier-Xu elementary moves P1 and P2
Elementary moves preserve polygonal real.mathlib_notes: Prove cut, paste, and cancellation first; reserve the Dyck case for a later focused PR.

One-face and one-vertex reduction.description: [missing] Use P1/P2 moves, validity, and connectedness to reduce any presentation to one face and one derived vertex.
depends_on: Gallier-Xu elementary moves P1 and P2
One-face and one-vertex reduction.mathlib_notes: This packages the first structural stages of Gallier-Xu's six-stage proof.

Orientable handle grouping.description: [missing] Collect orientation-compatible edge pairs into commutator blocks a b a⁻¹ b⁻¹.
Orientable handle grouping.mathlib_notes: This is an independent normal-form branch suitable for its own PR sequence.

Nonorientable crosscap grouping and Dyck.id: Nonorientable crosscap grouping and Dyck move
Nonorientable crosscap grouping and Dyck.description: [missing; hard] Collect same-orientation edge pairs into crosscaps and prove a handle plus a crosscap equivalent to three crosscaps.
Nonorientable crosscap grouping and Dyck.mathlib_notes: The Dyck transformation is the hardest isolated elementary-move soundness case.

Boundary-component grouping.description: [missing] Collect unmatched boundary darts into the canonical three-edge tails used by the Lean Eval representatives.
Boundary-component grouping.mathlib_notes: The number of tails supplies the benchmark boundary-component parameter n.

Sphere polygon quotient homeomorphic to.id: Sphere polygon quotient homeomorphic to the two-sphere
Sphere polygon quotient homeomorphic to.description: [missing] Prove the valid two-monogon sphere presentation realizes the metric two-sphere after the quotient cutover.
depends_on: Additive polygonal realization of a cell complex
Sphere polygon quotient homeomorphic to.mathlib_notes: PR #14 proves the sphere's incidence and occurrence-pairing facts, not this homeomorphism.

Corrected surface-cell-complex normal-fo.description: [replaces false sorry] Every valid connected surface cell complex has an admissible sphere, orientable, or nonorientable normal form.
depends_on: Nonorientable crosscap grouping and Dyck move
Sphere polygon quotient homeomorphic to the two-sphere
Canonical quotient correspondence with benchmark relations
Corrected surface-cell-complex normal-fo.mathlib_notes: Correct signature adds explicit K.IsSurfaceValid and K.IsConnected hypotheses.

Validity-aware Eval representative theor.description: [missing wiring] Convert the corrected normal-form witness to the exact benchmark disjunction while retaining explicit validity and connectedness inputs.
depends_on: Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorientable relations
Validity-aware Eval representative theor.mathlib_notes: The existing hasEvalRepresentative_of_hasNormalForm assembly proof is reusable once the definitions are faithful.

Lean Eval classification theorem.description: [goal] Prove the trusted Lean Eval statement exactly, with no extra typeclass hypothesis, no sorryAx, and the benchmark's closed-disc quotient relations.
depends_on: Exact Lean Eval orientable and nonorientable relations
Lean Eval classification theorem.mathlib_notes: The final transitivity/disjunction proof in EvalStatement.lean is already structurally adequate once both branches are corrected.
